inspiration.note: Game is abandoned, no legal risk for inspired re-creation with original assets replaced

target_audience: Casual RPG players, idle game enthusiasts, fans of King's Bounty / Heroes of Might and Magic mechanics
project_goal: Create a modern, fully-owned idle RPG inspired by Idle Bounty Adventures mechanics, but rebuilt from scratch with new tech, new graphics, expanded story, and future-proof architecture
key_differentiators: 100% self-owned stack (no dependency on external game servers)
Rich endgame systems (Tower, World Boss, PvP, Guilds)
Admin panel for live content management
documentation_format: JSON files in /docs/plan/ (this phase), to be converted to .md in final phase
next_phase_trigger: Approval of architecture + completion of all planning docs
